params.prompt: Use the attached reference image for the human founder portrait. Create a 4:5 premium Limitless Club PROGRAM GRAPHIC. Show the founder as a real human educator in light gray blazer and black shirt, standing beside a refined AI Agent Team Dashboard. Dashboard has three elegant cards labeled Chief of Staff Agent, Content Agent, Vibe Coding Agent. Required text: LIMITLESS CLUB; HERMES AGENT; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; Build the team that never sleeps.; คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Style: Midnight Luxe Editorial, black/charcoal/graphite, silver-white typography, electric blue UI glow, high negative space. Keep text readable. No robot replacing the founder. No extra logos, no clutter, no duplicate text.
